reviews.review_description: There is obviously some polish still missing, but what is there is very enjoyable. I like VR fitness games, and use a lot of them in rotation. BoomXR is different enough from all others that it fits in my collection. Please keep developing the app, this is a very promising start!

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for the review. If you enjoy BoomXR you should really checkout https://www.yolopia.com The new version of the game runs on WebXR and so plays straight from the builtin browser on the headset. It's still free and way better now, Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I have tried so hard to add my own music to the game like it says I can but the “/sdcard/mp3/“ file isn’t real and there’s no tutorials online I’ve tried connecting it to my pc I’ve downloaded music directly to the headset but still nothing works. On top of that the app won’t accept anything other than the file that doesn’t exist how do I listen to anything other than the same four default “songs”

reviews.review_title: It is great for the price. (Free)
reviews.review_description: It is an excellent game, unlike Beatsaber, X-Fitness, and ETC with predictable direction of the objects, and it would be nice to have options for grouping songs list together instead of choosing one at a time, FX sounds, and backgrounds.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for the review. If you enjoy BoomXR you should really checkout https://www.yolopia.com The new version of the game runs on WebXR and so plays straight from the builtin browser on the headset. It's still free and way better now, Cheers!

reviews.review_title: One of the best free games
reviews.review_description: The game is simple and pretty. It's for a good time, and it's free. As a suggestion, I'd like to see a flame decor or something similar in place of the dome, to put us more in the Mortal Kombat.

developer_response.body: Hi thanks a lot for the review. Development has moved to WebXR and I recommend you to try https://www.britshader.com it now works with internet radio and has several more modes of play

reviews.review_description: Thank you to make this game.^^

reviews.review_description: I played this game first then my friend bought me beat saber. Every time I play Beat saber i go back to this game and play 2ed song love it and you really can put MP3 it to the game that changed my renting after I found out. But it still need better blocking timing between targets and have a choice between vertical or horizontal walls not just both for the ducking impaired

reviews.review_title: Not bad for a free game!
reviews.review_description:
If you don't want to shell out the bucks for Beat Saber or Audica, this might do the trick for you.

80 to 90% of the time it felt like a solid rhythm game. Every so often though, the pad timings seemed to go off beat or what I thought was a pretty solid hit read as "Angle." Not sure if that's related to my fists angle in real life not lining up with how the game displayed my fists in VR.

Pretty respectable as far as free games go, and hope to see more from this developer in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Since I downloaded this app, I stop playing all other rhythm games, even Beast Saber. I love to listen and play on my own music and this app works great for me. 

Thanks whoever write this app. I hope you can see this review and know that I'm appreciated your work.
